g.text: O(1) Operations via Hashmap + Doubly Linked List

div.p: Singly linked: Removal requires finding predecessor → O(n) traversal Doubly linked: Each node has Prev pointer → O(1) removal from any position This is the critical optimization that makes LRU cache operations constant time.

g.text: CreatedAt time.Time // When entry was created
ExpiresAt time.Time // TTL expiration (zero = no expiry)

div.p: O(1) Lookup Direct pointer to node No traversal needed
O(1) Reorder Move to front: 4 pointer updates Evict tail: 2 pointer updates

ol.li: Insert at front → O(1) Total: O(1)
Delete from hashmap → O(1) Total: O(1)

div.p: Prev: null Next: → Node B Value: "alice"
Prev: ← Node A Next: → Node C Value: "widget"
Prev: ← Node B Next: → Node D Value: "sess_xyz"
Prev: ← Node C Next: null Value: "{...}"
